Off Calendar Sep-19-2025 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Alfredo Salazar.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:27 a.m.

Steven A. Booska, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Old Republic Insurance.
Mr. Booska appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Alfredo Salazar.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Suit on Judgment/Action on Judgment was filed on October 23, 2020.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant Alfredo Salazar occurred on June 8, 2021, and was effectuated on June 19, 2021.
Default as to defendant Alfredo Salazar was entered on September 7, 2021.
No DOE defendants were named in plaintiff's complaint.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Old Republic Insurance, and against the defaulted defendant Alfredo Salazar, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $78,348.45.
Prejudgment Interest - $88,930.24.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $739.05.

Total - $168,017.74.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit to the Court for review and signature.

Proceedings concluded at 10:30 a.m.
